languages.text: {n}Чужак изрыгает несколько непереводимых проклятий, переходящих в скрежещущий и щелкающий визг, когда плазменный резак оставляет лишь оплавленные дыры от его глаза и рта.{/n}
{n}The xenos spews several untranslatable curses that devolve into a grinding, clicking screech as the plasma cutter leaves only melted holes where its eyes and mouth were.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Чужак изрыгает несколько непереводимых проклятий, переходящих в скрежещущий и щелкающий визг, когда плазменный резак оставляет лишь оплавленные дыры от его глаза и рта.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The xenos spews several untranslatable curses that devolve into a grinding, clicking screech as the plasma cutter leaves only melted holes where its eyes and mouth were.{/n}
{n}The xenos spews several untranslatable curses that devolve into a grinding, clicking screech as the plasma cutter leaves only melted holes where its eyes and mouth were.{/n}
{n}The xenos spews several untranslatable curses that devolve into a grinding, clicking screech as the plasma cutter leaves only melted holes where its eyes and mouth were.{/n}

languages.text: {n}异形喷吐出了几句无法翻译的咒骂，咒骂却化为一阵刺耳的摩擦与咔嗒声。等离子体切割器掠过它的双眼与口部，仅留下几个熔化的孔洞。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos spews several untranslatable curses that devolve into a grinding, clicking screech as the plasma cutter leaves only melted holes where its eyes and mouth were.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}异形喷吐出了几句无法翻译的咒骂，咒骂却化为一阵刺耳的摩擦与咔嗒声。等离子体切割器掠过它的双眼与口部，仅留下几个熔化的孔洞。{/n}

languages.text: {n}El xenos escupe varios insultos intraducibles. Sin embargo, estos se convierten en chirridos y chasquidos incomprensibles cuando el soplete de plasma deja un hueco donde antes se encontraban sus ojos y su boca.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos spews several untranslatable curses that devolve into a grinding, clicking screech as the plasma cutter leaves only melted holes where its eyes and mouth were.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El xenos escupe varios insultos intraducibles. Sin embargo, estos se convierten en chirridos y chasquidos incomprensibles cuando el soplete de plasma deja un hueco donde antes se encontraban sus ojos y su boca.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le xénos crache une série de jurons intraduisibles, qui se transforment en un grincement strident émaillé de cliquetis lorsque le découpeur à plasma s'attaque à ses yeux et à sa bouche, ne laissant que des trous béants.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos spews several untranslatable curses that devolve into a grinding, clicking screech as the plasma cutter leaves only melted holes where its eyes and mouth were.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le xénos crache une série de jurons intraduisibles, qui se transforment en un grincement strident émaillé de cliquetis lorsque le découpeur à plasma s'attaque à ses yeux et à sa bouche, ne laissant que des trous béants.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Zeno, tercüme edilemeyen birkaç küfür savuruyor. Sonrasında plazma kesicisi gözlerinin ve ağzının olduğu yerde sadece erimiş delikler bırakırken bu küfürler; gıcırtı ve tıkırtıların eşlik ettiği bir çığlığa dönüşüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos spews several untranslatable curses that devolve into a grinding, clicking screech as the plasma cutter leaves only melted holes where its eyes and mouth were.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Zeno, tercüme edilemeyen birkaç küfür savuruyor. Sonrasında plazma kesicisi gözlerinin ve ağzının olduğu yerde sadece erimiş delikler bırakırken bu küfürler; gıcırtı ve tıkırtıların eşlik ettiği bir çığlığa dönüşüyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Xenos stößt einige unübersetzbare Flüche aus, die in ein knirschendes Kreischen münden, als der Plasmaschneider Auge und Mund in geschmolzene Löcher verwandet.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos spews several untranslatable curses that devolve into a grinding, clicking screech as the plasma cutter leaves only melted holes where its eyes and mouth were.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Xenos stößt einige unübersetzbare Flüche aus, die in ein knirschendes Kreischen münden, als der Plasmaschneider Auge und Mund in geschmolzene Löcher verwandet.{/n}

languages.text: {n}異形は、訳せない呪文を吐き出し、プラズマカッターが異形の目と口を溶かし穴にした後、歯ぎしりやクリック音のような悲鳴を上げる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos spews several untranslatable curses that devolve into a grinding, clicking screech as the plasma cutter leaves only melted holes where its eyes and mouth were.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}異形は、訳せない呪文を吐き出し、プラズマカッターが異形の目と口を溶かし穴にした後、歯ぎしりやクリック音のような悲鳴を上げる。{/n}
